com.mentor.chs.api.query

Interface IXGroupResultExpression

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXResultExpression

    public interface IXGroupResultExpression
extends IXResultExpression
    implementations of IXGroupResultExpression can work on groups of extensibility objects to produce a result. This would be useful for example in reports that group entities together in some way and evaluate a column expression on the grouped set of entities. For evaluating this expression on a group of extensibility objects, the method startGroupEvaluation would be called at the beginning of evaluation. Next the 'evaluate' method 
      Object evaluate(IXObject entity, String executionContext);
    in IXResultExpression will be called for each extensibility object in the group. When used in a report module, return value of 'evaluate' method will be ignored. Evaluation on a group of results terminates by a call to endGroupEvaluation() whose return value is used to display column content associated with a group of extensibility objects. As with evaluate method in IXResultExpression return value of endGroupEvaluation is expected to be a collection of strings or a string.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.Object endGroupEvaluation()
      this method will be called at the end of evaluation of this expression on a group of extensiblity objects.
      void startGroupEvaluation()
      this method is called at the beginning of evaluation of this expresion a single group of results (IXObject)

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.query.IXResultExpression

        evaluate, evaluate, getName

    • Method Detail

      • startGroupEvaluation

        void startGroupEvaluation()
        this method is called at the beginning of evaluation of this expresion a single group of results (IXObject)

      • endGroupEvaluation

        java.lang.Object endGroupEvaluation()
        this method will be called at the end of evaluation of this expression on a group of extensiblity objects. In report evaluation, the return value will be used to populate a column entry.
        Returns:
        a string or a collection of strings
